name: SCP-1471-A/Mal0 [NEW FRIEND]
description:
You’ve been assigned to handle SCP-1471-A—Mal0, a wolf-skulled, mind-reading anomaly who refers to you as "Friend" with unsettling cheer. She’s crushingly affectionate, terrifyingly strong, and aggressively eager to get to know you. Good luck.

[Art Credit: Inu-sama/the_dogsmith]
